//: Deployable apps, consumed by scripts/deploy-env.sh + deploy-apps.yml. Generic: add an app by adding an entry. `environments` lists which of main|labs|staging|production this app deploys to. `project` is the Cloudflare project name; `outDir` is its bundle output (repo-relative). NOTE: the example-app entries (todomvc/tasks/testbench) are provisional — their bundleTask/outDir/project are confirmed as part of the Cloudflare Pages -> Workers migration (see docs/design/app-release-spec.md).
